items.title: Under Chips to Startups (C2S), India made significant progress towards its target of training 85,000 semiconductor engineers;
items.snippet: Press Release:Press Information Bureau Ministry of Electronics & IT Under Chips to Startups (C2S), India made significant progress towards its target of training 85,000 semiconductor engineers; In 315 academic institutions, students across the country from Assam to Gujarat and from Kashmir to Kanyakumari are actively gaining experience in semiconductor design, fabrication, packaging and testing; Under India Semicondu…
